_meta.source: EU CosIng — Inventory of Ingredients (Function column)
_meta.key: lowercased INCI name as in cosing_inventory.csv
_meta.values: list of canonical CosIng function tags, lowercased
_meta.duplicate_inci_handling: If the same INCI appears on multiple inventory rows, their function tags are merged in first-seen order, preserving uniqueness.
